rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash` for the correct description 'Revenue & Payments' (including the ampersand). `gpt-5-mini` omitted the '&'. Both correctly identified this as a header with no amounts.
Consensus across both extractors for description, row type, and absence of amounts. Clearly a section header.
Consensus across both extractors. Amounts (7/13/11) are clearly legible and correctly aligned in the image.
Consensus across both extractors. Amounts (294/8/10) are clearly legible and correctly aligned in the image.

Selected `gemini-flash` for the correct description 'Other Expenses.' (including the full stop). `gpt-5-mini` omitted the full stop. Amounts agreed between extractors. Both correctly recognized the subtotal as a separate row.

Consensus across both extractors for description, row type, and absence of amounts. Clearly a section header.

Selected `gemini-flash`'s reading. Visual verification confirms a clear dot in the pence column, which is standard ledger notation for '0'. `gemini-flash` correctly interpreted this, while `gpt-5-mini` left pence blank due to perceived ambiguity.
Selected `gpt-5-mini` for the more accurate abbreviation 'Bldgs.' in the description. `gemini-flash` spelled out 'Buildings'. Amounts agreed between extractors.
